neighborhoods.name: Victoria (Rabat)
neighborhoods.description: Gozo's capital with the Citadella fortress, daily market, and the island's main commercial center
neighborhoods.character: Citadel town, compact, main services hub
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Victoria. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Marsalforn
neighborhoods.description: Main seaside resort with waterfront restaurants, salt pans, and a popular diving scene
neighborhoods.character: Seaside resort, diving hub, relaxed waterfront

housing.predominantType: Apartments and holiday properties near the waterfront

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Victoria's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Xaghra / Nadur
neighborhoods.description: Hilltop villages with megalithic temples, lower costs, and traditional village festa culture
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Xlendi / Sannat
neighborhoods.description: Small bay resort and clifftop village popular with expats seeking quiet Gozitan life
neighborhoods.character: Bay resort, clifftop views, quiet expat life

housing.predominantType: Apartments, converted farmhouses, and bay-view properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
